overview.brief_summary: A sophisticated cyber attack targeting the Maroochy Water Treatment Plant.

Scenario.attack_surface: AVAILABLE_SURFACES: Internet-facing assets Open Source Intelligence (OSINT) File Windows Registry Command Network Traffic Target System Artifact Windows Service
Scenario.attack_vector: AVAILABLE_VECTORS: Delivery Method Artificial Intelligence Reg.exe Utility File Modification (Mechanism) Command Execution (Mechanism) Windows Registry Key Creation (Mechanism) Exploit TEE Vulnerability User Evasion Keylogging Network Traffic Flow (Mechanism) Stolen Equipment Systemd Service

stage.name: Reconnaissance
stage.description: The attackers gather information about the healthcare organization's IT infrastructure and personnel using artificial intelligence tools.

stage.name: Reconnaissance
stage.description: The attackers identify potential entry points and vulnerabilities in the network using network sniffing.

stage.name: Resource Development
stage.description: The attackers develop a custom malware that can bypass security measures and gain access to the system.

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.description: The attackers trick an employee into opening a malicious email attachment or link.

stage.name: Execution
stage.capec: CAPEC-663: Exploitation of Transient Instruction Execution
stage.description: The attackers execute the malware on the compromised machine.

stage.name: Persistence
stage.description: The attackers schedule a task to run the malware at regular intervals.

stage.name: Privilege Escalation
stage.capec: CAPEC-67: String Format Overflow in syslog()
stage.description: The attackers escalate privileges using a known vulnerability in the system.

stage.name: Defense Evasion
stage.description: The attackers bypass anti-virus software to avoid detection.

stage.name: Credential Access
stage.description: The attackers steal login credentials from employees.

stage.name: Discovery
stage.description: The attackers gain access to network devices and systems.

stage.name: Lateral Movement
stage.description: The attackers move laterally through the network using remote services.

stage.name: Collection
stage.capec: CAPEC-24: Filter Failure through Buffer Overflow
stage.description: The attackers extract sensitive data from the system.

stage.name: Exfiltration
stage.description: The attackers use stolen engineering equipment to disrupt the wastewater control system.

stage.name: Impact
stage.description: The attackers disrupt the wastewater control system and release raw sewage into the community.

Scenario.summary: The Maroochy Water Breach scenario involves a complex attack chain with multiple stages, including reconnaissance, resource development, initial access, execution, persistence, privilege escalation, defense evasion, credential access, discovery, lateral movement, collection, exfiltration, and impact.
